title: acranthera uniflora
intro: Acranthera uniflora, also known as the single-flowered Acranthera, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. Acranthera uniflora is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Acranthera uniflora can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, often made by steeping the leaves in hot water or boiling them in a medicinal tea.
